report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: DePIN Earning Guide 2026 (how to earn crypto running DePIN nodes with real earnings data) and BTCFi Yield Strategies Guide 2026 (how to earn yield on Bitcoin through Babylon, Lombard, Solv, and BounceBit with tiered strategies).

sections.title: Research Brief
items: DePIN sector hit record $2.6M monthly protocol revenue in Jan 2026; Helium and XNET posted 600%+ YoY revenue growth; DePIN market projected to reach $3.5T by 2028
Top DePIN earning tiers: zero-cost bandwidth sharing (Grass $5-20/mo), wireless/mapping ($20-200/mo with hardware), GPU compute (io.net/Render $500+/mo with existing GPUs)
BTCFi TVL grew from $304M (Jan 2024) to $8.6B+ (mid-2025) — 28x increase in 18 months
Babylon Protocol leads BTCFi at ~$2.8B TVL with native BTC staking; Lombard (LBTC) holds 50%+ market share among yield-bearing BTC tokens, hit $1B TVL in 92 days
Solv Protocol at $2.29B TVL with 19,385 BTC in on-chain reserves; xSolvBTC yields 3-8% APY
BounceBit manages $5B+ deployed assets via CeDeFi strategies; Lombard partnering with Bitwise for institutional custody Q2 2026

sections.title: Content Created
items: DePIN Earning Guide 2026 (~3,200 words): Covers 7 DePIN protocols (Grass, Storj, Helium, Hivemapper, Render, io.net, Filecoin) with earnings comparison table, hardware requirements, 3-tier getting started guide ($0/$50-500/$500-5000+), risks section, 5-question FAQ

BTCFi Yield Strategies Guide 2026 (~3,000 words): Covers 4 major BTCFi protocols (Babylon, Lombard, Solv, BounceBit) with 3 risk-tiered strategies (conservative 2-4%/moderate 4-8%/aggressive 5-12%+), protocol comparison table, detailed risk breakdown (smart contract/slashing/liquidity/bridge), 5-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: DePIN guide: title='How to Earn Crypto with DePIN Nodes in 2026 — Complete Guide | degen0x', target keyword='DePIN earning guide', 11 keywords, schemas: Article + FAQ (5 questions)
BTCFi guide: title='BTCFi Yield Strategies 2026 — How to Earn Yield on Bitcoin | degen0x', target keyword='BTCFi yield strategies', 11 keywords, schemas: Article + FAQ (5 questions)

Internal links: ai-depin-crypto-guide, bitcoin-etf-guide-2026, babylon-protocol-bitcoin-staking, btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026, defi-yields, defi-risk-scanner, defi-position-manager, staking-apy, privacy-coins-guide-2026
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: No interactive components needed — both are learn/education guides with static content (comparison tables, info boxes, tiered strategy cards, FAQs). DePIN guide includes an inline comparison table acting as an interactive decision tool.
